recent.title: Belliwelli x FERMÀT|| Bi-Weekly
recent.summary: Reviewed $28K revenue (30d), 56% subscription rate (30% above benchmark). CVR at 1.38% (target 3%), revenue per session $0.72 (target $1.25). Best Seller GLP-1 funnel leading with 29K sessions, 1.4% CVR. Gummies GLP-1 v1 at 2.42% CVR and Generic Gummies v1 at 2.5% CVR identified as scaling candidates. Doctor Backed Generic Fiber at 0.19% CVR with $5,050 ad spend needs complete overhaul. Discussed new FERMÀT features: Build Your Own Bundle, External MCP, Shopify Markets, AI Module Generator.

recent.title: Thomas Fitzpatrick and Pulkit Srivastava
recent.summary: First meeting between Pulkit and Tom. Tom returned from Expo West. BelliWelli using FERMÀT since November with strong satisfaction. Team includes email designer (UK), Shopify developers (India), external marketing agency. Key priorities: revenue optimization, subscription take rate maximization. Currently testing free tub (cucumber/yuzu) vs 20% discount subscription offers. AI search feature discussed as future opportunity.
action_items: Pulkit: Deep dive into account performance and prepare recommendations
Pulkit: Review heat maps for funnel drop-off points
Schedule bimonthly (every 2 weeks) calls going forward

calls.analysis: BelliWelli has regular bi-weekly calls with strong engagement from Tom Fitzpatrick (Dir. Ecommerce) and Morry Mitrani. The brand transitioned from Talia (previous CSM) to Pulkit on Feb 25. First Pulkit-Tom call was Mar 9, followed by a productive bi-weekly on Mar 23. The brand is self-sufficient on FERMÀT, building funnels and setting up experiments independently. Key focus areas: CVR optimization (1.38% vs 3% target), subscription take rate maximization (currently 56%), and scaling high-CVR funnels like Gummies GLP-1 v1 (2.42%) and Generic Gummies v1 (2.5%). The Doctor Backed Generic Fiber funnel is a major underperformer at 0.19% CVR despite $5,050 ad spend.

messages.text: Screenshot showing experiment creative changes ARE showing in Experiment tab despite reverting on save
Having trouble setting up test - variant changes reverting on save. Shared Loom video. CC'd Morry

Asked about making a PDP with option to pick powders OR gummies (similar to flavor selector)
Posted detailed call recap: $28K revenue, 56% subscription rate, 1.38% CVR, action items for both sides, link to bi-weekly deck
CODE RED - funnel page 404ing on Doctor Backed Generic Fiber. Shared screen recording from mobile Chrome
Experiment running since Friday with no data showing up. Tagged Talia and Pulkit
Asked about wrong lead image pulling on PDP - should be single tub image only
Congratulated Talia on new role, welcomed Pulkit, said he'd grab a call
Intro message: New GM at FERMÀT, with team 1.5 years, shared Calendly link
Transition announcement: Moving to Enterprise team, introducing Pulkit as new GM for BelliWelli
Sent performance analysis docs for Best Sellers GLP1 and Gummies GLP1 v1 funnels. Reminded about contract renewal rolling on Feb 22
Asked about Free Tub with Subscription setup via Loom - wants to restrict gift to smallest variant only
Asked about split destination test setup - curious what website performance data FERMÀT can show

slack.analysis: Active Slack channel with frequent engagement from Tom Fitzpatrick (Dir. Ecommerce) and Morry Mitrani. Tom is the primary point of contact, raising technical issues (experiment variant reverting, 404 pages, PDP image issues), requesting new features (powder/gummies PDP selector), and actively building funnels. Pulkit joined the channel Feb 24 and has been responsive with detailed call recaps. Key open issues: (1) Experiment variant changes reverting on save (Mar 31, 9 thread replies), (2) CODE RED 404 on Doctor Backed funnel (Mar 18, 12 replies - likely resolved), (3) Experiment data not showing (Mar 11, 12 replies). The brand is highly engaged and self-sufficient with platform usage.

email.analysis: Gmail results are predominantly Meta ad approval notifications (7 of 9 results), indicating active ad campaign management for BelliWelli on Meta. One Loom notification shows the 'Belliwelli Issue' video was viewed (related to experiment variant reverting bug). One Glyphic daily task overview included BelliWelli items. No direct brand-to-CSM email threads found in the last 30 days; all communication appears to flow through Slack.
